title: And You Thought Your Parents Were Weird
original_title: And You Thought Your Parents Were Weird!
overview: Two boys follow in their late fathers foot steps by inventing weird and wonderful gadgets. Trouble lies ahead when after a halloween party the spirit of their father ends up in the latest invention, a robot.
